action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP model with 10 frozen blocks got val_ba=0.7243 after 10 epochs. The model is still improving. Previous DINOv2 5-epoch model got test=0.6199, 20-epoch got test=0.4563 (overfitting). Analysis: Need to submit CLIP checkpoint to measure test performance. The CLIP backbone should generalize better. Also, the val_ba=0.7243 is lower than DINOv2's 0.8422 but test performance may be better since CLIP features are more domain-invariant. Decision: Submit current CLIP checkpoint to get test score, then continue training with more epochs if promising.
